description: Catalog validation rules and rule coverage

instructions.intent: Catalog all validation rule types supported by the roadmap system. Analyze coverage: which rule types appear in the active DAG, which are unused, which combinations are underutilized. Identify gaps between declared and implemented rules.
acceptance_criteria: Document covers: all ValidationRule types (artifact-exists, shell, build-produces, launch-check, spec-conformance, expanded)
Usage frequency matrix across current DAG
Gaps identified: missing implementations, untested rule types, edge cases
